# 3ASY

> 3ASY is the software product line of 3FESTO SRL, an Italian technology company based in Bologna. We build practical, AI-assisted tools that solve real operational problems, drawing on hands-on experience in additive manufacturing and day-to-day company operations.

Each product starts from a concrete need we faced ourselves, ships fast, and is validated in real use before it is offered to others. The line spans mature in-production software, public pilots, early-stage betas and long-term research.

- Canonical site (Italian): https://www.3asy.it/
- English site: https://www.3asy.it/en/
- Status page: https://www.3asy.it/status
- Parent company: https://www.3festo.com/
- Contact: info@3festo.com

## Products

- [3ASYHR](https://hr.3asy.app/): **In production.** Attendance and HR platform that turns calendar activity into validated timesheets, handles leave approvals and device inventory, and surfaces the real cost and margin of every resource. Running daily with 30+ people across three companies for over a year.
- [3ASYBNB](https://bnb.3asy.app/): **Selected beta.** Guided month-end reporting for short-term-rental property managers: it normalizes mixed source documents, applies deterministic financial and tax rules, flags anomalies and generates owner-ready PDF reports. Public launch planned for January 1, 2027.
- [3ASYCAD](https://www.3asycad.com/): **Long-term vision.** Browser workspace for additive-manufacturing build preparation — printability scoring, mesh repair, TPMS lattices, stiffness estimates and nesting — built for AM professionals from the same expertise behind ANY3DP.
- [3ASYGIT](https://git.3asy.app/): **Public pilot.** A finished, playful experiment that turns a GitHub contribution history into an explorable 3D city, solar system or speed circuit.
- [3ASYRESEARCH](https://research.3asy.app/): **Early stage.** Research papers reworked into plain-language explanations and interactive tools, with live cases for hybrid TPMS generation and MJF production-cost modeling.

## Optional

- [ANY3DP](https://www.any3dp.com/): 3FESTO's flagship industrial additive-manufacturing platform (the sister line to 3ASY).
- [Source repository](https://github.com/3FESTO/3ASY-LANDING): public source of this landing site.
- [Sitemap](https://www.3asy.it/sitemap.xml)

## Notes

- Publisher: 3FESTO SRL — Bologna, Emilia-Romagna, Italy
- Languages: Italian and English
- Product maturity ranges from in-production to experimental; verify current status and details on each linked product site.
- Last reviewed: 2026-07-15
